— Practice

Boddam Infrastructure Pvt. Ltd.

Sixteen years.
One conviction.

— Who we are

We are engineers, designers, hydrologists, geotechnical specialists and project leaders. We work on the structures cities depend on long after the ribbon-cutting.

Our office is deliberately mid-sized — large enough to deliver sovereign-scale programs, small enough that a partner is personally accountable for every commission. We take fewer projects than our peers and stay on them longer.

— Principles

Four ideas we don't compromise.

Principle 01

Engineering certainty

Every load path, every weld, every kilometre is signed off by a chartered engineer before it leaves our office.

Principle 02

Architectural ambition

Infrastructure is read by the public for a century. We design for the eye as carefully as for the load case.

Principle 03

Patient capital

We accept commissions that take seven years. The slow work is the work that lasts.

Principle 04

Civic responsibility

Roads, grids and water are common goods. We treat them as instruments of public trust.

— Trajectory

A slow, deliberate climb.

2009

Founded in Hyderabad with a single bridge contract on the NH-44 corridor.

2013

First international commission: viaduct system for the Colombo Outer Circular Highway.

2017

Energy division established; awarded 240 MW solar park, Rajasthan.

2021

Open dedicated water & desalination practice in Ahmedabad.

2024

Crossed 3.4B USD of infrastructure under active engineering management.

Boddam Infra · Est. 2009

Build what
outlasts us.

An engineering practice shaping bridges, energy, water and transit infrastructure across three continents.
